stocks.impact_theory: Alphabet reported strong Q1 2026 earnings with Cloud revenue up 63% YoY to $20B and Search up 19%. Economic implications include accelerated AI adoption boosting cloud demand. Market psychology: Relief that AI investments are paying off, reducing fears of over-spending. Historical parallels: Similar to 2020 post-COVID tech surge. Analogies: Like a rocket igniting after fuel load; engine roaring as cloud backlog doubles to $460B.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat expectations, X posts bullish on cloud growth, web news highlights 7% premarket gain amid Big Tech rally despite oil tensions.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains in next week on momentum.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Broader market selloff from Fed/inflation, competition in AI.

stocks.justification: Clear earnings beat, positive X sentiment, historical post-earnings runs.

stocks.impact_theory: META beat earnings but raised FY26 Capex to $125-145B for AI, causing selloff. Implications: Higher spending pressures margins short-term. Psychology: Fear of AI bubble. Parallels: 2022 meta-verse spend fears. Analogies: Filling gas tank before race, painful but necessary; planting seeds for harvest.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts note drop despite beat due to capex hike, web confirms AI spend concerns amid $500B industry checks.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: AI payoff surprises positively, regulatory wins.

stocks.justification: Mixed sentiment, capex fear dominant but fundamentals solid.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil surged to $126 on US-Iran blockade prolongation. Implications: Higher revenues, inflation risk. Psychology: Geopolitical fear boosts energy. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine war oil spike. Analogies: Filling sails with wind; dam bursting floods fields.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web news on oil high, X buzz on Iran war, energy sector leading gains.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: De-escalation drops oil, recession curbs demand.

stocks.justification: Direct link to oil price, historical precedents strong.

stocks.impact_theory: MSFT AI revenue strong, but sideways post-earnings. Implications: Enterprise AI spend up. Psychology: Steady growth. Parallels: Post-ChatGPT launch. Analogies: Building foundation steadily; marathon not sprint.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X mentions AI ARR $37B, web on tech lift despite oil.

stocks.impact_theory: AMZN at ATH post-earnings, AWS strong. Implications: E-comm resilient. Psychology: Consumer spend ok despite oil. Parallels: 2021 recovery. Analogies: River flowing stronger; tree roots deep.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X bullish adds, web on ATH open, Big Tech momentum.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Oil inflation hits consumer, logistics costs.
